sections.tech_stack_subtitle_desktop: I use modern and battle-tested tools to ensure applications are fast, secure, and maintainable.
sections.services_business_desc: Need a custom tool to optimize operations? I develop robust SaaS platforms and internal systems focused on ROI.
sections.services_recruiters_desc: Looking for a developer who understands clean code? I prioritize technical competence and scalability.

footer.cta_text: Currently accepting new freelance projects and internship opportunities for 2024.

services.title: Citrus-Track (2025)
services.description: Team Lead / Full Stack. Web/mobile app for citrus traceability. (React, Node, MySQL, WebSocket).

services.title: Academic Management (2025)
services.description: Full Stack Developer. System for student management and performance pattern detection. (React, Node, MySQL).

services.title: Freelance
services.description: Custom web solutions development and technical support.

projects_mobile.title: Pachakusi
projects_mobile.impact: Comprehensive platform that automates retail sales, with smart reports and AI-powered customer service.
projects_mobile.description: E-commerce with admin panel, Excel/CSV reports, and AI (Gemini) integration for chats and auto-descriptions.
projects_mobile.challenge: Create a seamless shopping experience with complex inventory management and smart support.
projects_mobile.solution: Integration of Google Gemini to improve interaction and automate administrative tasks on a MERN architecture.

projects_mobile.title: Col. Santísimo Rosario
projects_mobile.impact: Total modernization of the school system, removing WordPress dependency and centralizing digital records.
projects_mobile.description: WordPress to custom platform migration. Concurrency management for shifts and digital records with PDF reports.
projects_mobile.challenge: Migrate legacy data ensuring integrity and solving high concurrency issues in shift bookings.
projects_mobile.solution: Scalable Node.js architecture with robust transaction control and dynamic PDF document generation.

projects_mobile.title: Guido Spano Institute
projects_mobile.impact: Early detection of low performance and 90% automation of administrative certificate workload.
projects_mobile.description: System with attendance control, grades, and mass certificate automation.
projects_mobile.challenge: Replace slow manual processes with a fast and reliable digital flow for thousands of records.
projects_mobile.solution: Implementation of background processes for document generation and automatic email notifications.

projects_mobile.title: Citrus Track
projects_mobile.impact: Best Transversal Project (UTN). 40% reduction in logistics delays through real-time monitoring.
projects_mobile.description: Real-time logistics traceability system with WebSockets and Google Maps.
projects_mobile.challenge: Seamless visualization of concurrent fleets and data consistency in high latency.
projects_mobile.solution: Use of WebSockets for bidirectional communication and map clustering to optimize visual performance.

projects_mobile.title: PhotoFest
projects_mobile.impact: Facilitated real-time collection of +500 photos at social events without app installation.
projects_mobile.description: Real-time photo upload platform for social events without registration.
projects_mobile.challenge: Allow massive concurrent uploads and real-time viewing without complex backend.
projects_mobile.solution: Serverless-like architecture using MongoDB as DB and Cloudinary for media.

projects_desktop.title: Pachakusi
projects_desktop.impact: B2C retail platform that optimizes management through automatic reports and improves conversion with smart assistance.
projects_desktop.description: E-commerce with complete admin panel, Excel/CSV report export, and integrated AI (Gemini) for descriptions and chat.
projects_desktop.challenge: Manage large volumes of retail data and provide 24/7 automatic and effective support.
projects_desktop.solution: Implementation of a robust MERN architecture with LLM integration for natural language tasks.

projects_desktop.title: Santísimo Rosario College
projects_desktop.impact: Successful migration of 15 years of data to a React platform, eliminating WordPress vulnerabilities.
projects_desktop.description: WordPress to custom platform migration with concurrency management and digital records/PDF generation.
projects_desktop.challenge: Optimize shift booking to avoid overbooking and ensure privacy of academic history.
projects_desktop.solution: Optimistic Locking on the DB and process queues for heavy PDF generation without blocking the server.

projects_desktop.title: Citrus Track
projects_desktop.impact: Winner of 'Best Transversal Project'. 100% digitalization of real-time logistics tracking.
projects_desktop.description: Advanced logistics traceability system with real-time geolocation via WebSockets and Google Maps.
projects_desktop.challenge: Massive GPS coordinate synchronization with minimal front-end load.
projects_desktop.solution: Event-driven architecture with Redis for position caching and Socket.io for instant updates.

projects_desktop.title: Guido Spano Institute
projects_desktop.impact: Modernization of the institute's academic office, facilitating attendance and grade auditing.
projects_desktop.description: Academic management platform with attendance control, grades, and mass certificate automation via PDF.
projects_desktop.challenge: Migrate thousands of physical report cards to an accessible and secure digital format.
projects_desktop.solution: Modular system with hierarchical roles and dynamic template engine for certificates.

projects_desktop.title: PhotoFest
projects_desktop.impact: Facilitated real-time collection of +500 photos at social events without app installation.
projects_desktop.description: Collaborative real-time photo gallery for weddings and parties. Guests upload photos via QR without installing apps.
projects_desktop.challenge: Create a low-cost but high-performance system to handle hundreds of concurrent uploads.
projects_desktop.solution: Lightweight backend with Node.js orchestrating Cloudinary (Image CDN) and using MongoDB as NoSQL database.

why_custom.title: Why Choose Custom Software?
why_custom.scalability_desc: Built to grow with your business, not limit it. No license fees per user.
why_custom.ownership_desc: You own the code and the data. No vendor lock-in or hidden costs.
why_custom.integration_desc: Connects seamlessly with your existing tools and workflows.

cta.title: Ready to scale your business?
cta.description: This project was built to solve specific business problems. I can build a custom solution tailored exactly to your needs.
